CUUBEMOSAIC

Transforming cubes into colourful stories

02 — What We Do

Our Services

CuubeMosaic transforms any image into handcrafted Rubik's Cube mosaic artwork — built cube by cube, face by face, for homes, offices, and large-scale installations.

🖼️

Custom Portrait Mosaics

Personal photos transformed into Rubik's cube art. Your face, your story, your cubes.

🎨

Wall Installations

Large-scale feature pieces for homes, offices, and commercial spaces that stop people in their tracks.

🏢

Commercial Art Installations

Hotels, cafes, reception areas, public spaces, and branded environments — art that defines a space.

🎮

Pop Culture & Character Art

Movies, gaming, superheroes, music icons, and fan art — brought to life one cube at a time.
